ops.title: E30–E43 campaign synthesis: the instrument is the binding constraint
ops.body:
Interim synthesis of the 2026-07-19/20 breadth campaign (E30–E43). Every result below is independently VERIFY-confirmed. One thesis unifies them: **cc-steer has reached a plateau where real improvements exist but the frozen eval frames + training noise cannot certify them — the instrument, not the model or method, is the binding constraint.**

## Evidence (all VERIFY-confirmed)
- **E29/E30.1** (decision/pick task): the null was the instrument — only 14 discordant pairs in n=202, frame MDE 0.05 > the +0.03 effect; every directional signal favored the FT model (Beta posterior 0.94).
- **E30.5 σ_train**: 5 identical-recipe watcher retrains (seed-only) spread AUC by 0.020 → σ_train=0.008, an FT-vs-FT actionability floor of **0.036 at m=1**. Most watcher-recipe tweaks move <0.02 → undetectable. The weekly promotion gate promotes on single-run deltas below this → may be promoting training noise.
- **E33** (triage rubric): an induced fault-existence rubric **halved the judge's over-flagging** (25→14 on held-out test) — a real behavioral fix — but McNemar p=0.26 (only 20 discordant pairs); the frozen n=170 frame can't certify a +3.5pt effect.
- **E36** (gate encoders): Ettin-150m beats the incumbent gate **+0.048** (6σ_train robust, CI excludes 0) but misses actionability by **0.0009** (|Δ| 0.0482 vs frame MDE 0.0491); actionably beats the probe floor. A better architecture the frozen n=1325 frame can't certify.
- **E32** (many-shot watcher): a clean, robust NEGATIVE — prompt-only many-shot is actionably worse than FT (0.867 vs 0.932) and hits a hard ARG_MAX ceiling (~186 exemplars). "Prompts instead of FT for the watcher" = no.
- **E31**: the clarification-timing position prior is near-chance (0.544) but has exploitable per-dimension structure (direct-early, correct-late).
- **E43** (steer-type encoder): a cheap encoder partially distills the judge (acc 0.657 > baselines) but the human-matching arm fails (macro-F1 0.054, data-starved on 174 human rows) vs the LLM's 0.589 — the bottleneck is human labels, not the model.
- **E30.3**: judge-vs-auditor κ=0.618 (PoLL 3-jury band); the judge over-flags (93:12) and confuses operational_directive. **E30.4**: calibration axes + conformal ready. **E30.7**: the deployed judge is a single-shot scaffolded extract whose ~52K tool schemas are load-bearing (lean strips them AND degrades the judge).

## The ≤3 handoffs (all instrument-gated)
1. **Triage prompt** → E33 rubric_4 (halves over-flag): deployment candidate for the E30.2b live monitor, NOT the frozen frame.
2. **Gate recipe** → Ettin-150m encoder (+0.048 over the TF-IDF-level sklearn gate): candidate contingent on a larger gate frame.
3. **Promotion gate** → incorporate σ_train (0.036 floor) so it stops promoting training noise. (→ cc-notes task 162a5dc.)

## Reprioritization (σ_train- and near-miss-informed)
The three near-misses (E33, E36, decision task) all need the SAME thing to ship: a better instrument. So the highest-value remaining work is the instrument capstone, not more architecture experiments against the same underpowered frames:
- **HIGH**: E30.2a (session-fold cross-fit → n≈1803, MDE≈0.017), E30.2b (mirror refresh + Waudby-Smith–Ramdas live monitor — certifies E33+E36 over accrual), E30.6 (card v2 encoding σ_train + text-disjointness).
- **WORTH IT** (not instrument-limited): E41 (distill resident judge — a COST experiment).
- **LOWER** (likely more instrument-limited near-misses): E37 (MoE ceiling), E40 (trajectory — also needs the trajectory frame re-freeze, currently undercounting ~3.4x).
- **DEFERRED**: E39 (σ_train-swamped), E34/E35 (E33 covers the triage-prompt slot), E42 (needs E30.2a).

## Engineering artifacts shipped
instrument.py (paired DeLong), decisions miner, steer-type/pick/trajectory frames + many-shot + encoder infra; fixes: b998264 (verified, release pending), docs-CI timeout, multi-select recovery, 2 Linux-ty leaks. Findings saved to memory: judge tool-schemas load-bearing; pyqwest 0.7.0 breaks Tinker; don't SendMessage into workflow-internal agents; text-disjointness ≠ session-disjointness.
